result.reason: The application crashes when a UI panel containing active connections is closed, indicating a resource management or null reference bug.
result.approach: Investigate the panel closing logic in ConnectionWindow.cs and PanelAdder.cs to ensure connections and associated resources are properly disposed of or reassigned when a panel is closed, preventing crashes.
